html:
Exclusive to:

Adverts are Items exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. Like Blueprints, the Adverts can be learnt to unlock one of Floats or Lures for crafting. They have a fuel value of 15 seconds, and can be erased at Cartographer's Desk.

Available Adverts

The following Floats or Lures can be unlocked from their corresponding Adverts:

Advert Dropped by
1.09%
exchange heavy with
exchange heavy with
exchange heavy with
exchange heavy with

Trivia

  • Adverts were introduced in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.
  • Adverts were changed to be learnable like blueprints instead of having to be placed into the Tackle Receptacle in the March 2022 QoL update. They were also removed from the drops of Birds, Moose/Goose, and Malbatross

Exclusive to:
“A picture of some fishing tackle. I bet I could make this...”
–Wilson
“Who even reads fishing magazines? Uh, apart from me right now...”
–Willow
“Picture will help Wolfgang catch fish!”
–Wolfgang
“New methods for ripping fish from their peaceful lives.”
–Wendy
“SCHEMATICS TO MURDER FISH MORE EFFICIENTLY”
–WX-78
“Interesting! These would improve my fishing significantly!”
–Wickerbottom
“Hey, there's some great ideas for new tackle on here!”
–Woodie
“What forbidden fishing knowledge do you hold?”
–Maxwell
“This scröll bears hidden secrets öf fishing!”
–Wigfrid
“It has fishing secrets!”
–Webber
“Ah, it looks like a recipe for some fishing tackle.”
–Warly
“Glub Glub pictures”
–Wormwood
“Hey! This will come in real handy next time I go fishin'!”
–Winona
“Some cunning plans to put fish in our hands!”
–Wortox
“Ooooh, pictures!”
–Wurt
“This looks pretty easy to make.”
–Walter
“I don't think I've seen this type of tackle before. Or maybe I just forgot...”
–Wanda

'''Adverts''' are [[Items]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. Like [[Blueprint]]s, the Adverts can be learnt to unlock one of [[Floats]] or [[Lures]] for crafting. They have a fuel value of 15 seconds, and can be erased at [[Cartographer's Desk]].

==Available Adverts==
The following Floats or Lures can be unlocked from their corresponding Adverts:
{| class="wikitable"
! scope="col" |Advert
! scope="col" |Dropped by
|-
|{{pic32|Jet Quill Float}}||{{pic32|Ocean Debris Land|Ocean Debris}} 1.09%
|-
|{{pic32|Stupefying Lure}}||exchange heavy {{pic32|Fallounder}} with {{pic24|Crabby Hermit}} 
|-
|{{pic32|Rainy Day Lure}}||exchange heavy {{pic32|Bloomfin Tuna}} with {{pic24|Crabby Hermit}} 
|-
|{{pic32|Heavy Weighted Lure}}||exchange heavy {{pic32|Scorching Sunfish}} with {{pic24|Crabby Hermit}} 
|-
|{{pic32|Snow Day Lure}} ||exchange heavy {{pic32|Ice Bream}} with {{pic24|Crabby Hermit}} 
|}

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== 
*Adverts were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Hook, Line, and Inker|Hook, Line, and Inker]]'' update.
*Adverts were changed to be learnable like blueprints instead of having to be placed into the Tackle Receptacle in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]]. They were also removed from the drops of [[Birds]], [[Moose/Goose]], and [[Malbatross]]
